title: Mentor Guide — Day 10 — Market Validation Pitch
coachingObjective: Coach squads through evidence-based pitch delivery and Stage Gate II readiness.

timing.preSession: Review pitch readiness cards: FEC, portfolio, professional readiness
timing.duringSession: Support pitch delivery; capture weekly squad review
timing.postSession: Submit stage gate decision and up to 3 commendations

discussionQuestions: Did the pitch reflect what the market taught the squad?
Which customer quotes landed strongest with the audience?
Is the squad Ready For Build?
coachingTips: Rate four dimensions only — no individual rubrics
Use Squad XP dashboard for automatic activity credit
Commendations max 3 per squad (Leadership, Best Interview, etc.)
warningSigns: Pitch slides manually rewritten outside SPIKE (duplicate encoding)
reflectionPrompts: What is the one insight every advisor should know from your squad's research?

activityCoachingNotes.notes: Presentation mode in SPIKE Studio — large cards, minimal text.
Stage Gate: Not Ready / Almost Ready / Ready For Build.
